volumeType.title: Volume Type
volumeType.description: The volume type (gp2, gp3, io1, io2, st1, sc1, standard)

size.title: Size (GiB)
size.description: The size of the volume in GiB

iops.title: IOPS
iops.description: The number of I/O operations per second

throughput.title: Throughput (MiB/s)
throughput.description: The throughput provisioned for the volume in MiB/s

availabilityZone.title: Availability Zone
availabilityZone.description: The Availability Zone in which the volume resides

state.title: State
state.description: The current state of the volume

creationDate.title: Creation Date
creationDate.description: The date and time the volume was created

encrypted.title: Encrypted
encrypted.description: Indicates whether the volume is encrypted

autoEnableIO.title: Auto Enable IO
autoEnableIO.description: Indicates whether the volume is auto-enabled for I/O operations

arn.title: ARN
arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the volume
